positive: A sophisticated, highly detailed line art illustration of a crescent moon cradling bioluminescent stylized flowers and delicate trailing vines. The style should evoke Art Nouveau etching combined with modern geometric linocut techniques. Focus on extreme detail in the organic forms and the negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, creating a strong, isolated silhouette suitable for apparel printing. The color direction should be deep midnight blue and rich gold accents, rendered with crisp, high-contrast vector lines, emphasizing elegant symmetry and clean edges.
negative: blur, amateur, artifact, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, cropped, out of frame, logo, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low detail
